title: polypodium lycopodioides var. myrtillifolium
intro: Polypodium lycopodioides var. myrtillifolium is a variety of the Polypodium lycopodioides plant, a species of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium lycopodioides var. myrtillifolium include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
